summary: Iteration 120: WhatsApp Sale Voucher Send + GST Summary Dialog - All 12 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. WhatsApp send endpoint generates PDF, uploads to tmpfiles.org, returns pdf_url. GST Summary dialog shows HSN-wise CGST/SGST/IGST breakup with totals.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/sale-book/{id}/whatsapp-send generates PDF and uploads to tmpfiles.org
VERIFIED: WhatsApp send returns 404 for non-existent voucher
VERIFIED: WhatsApp send returns pdf_url in response (even when API key not set)
VERIFIED: WhatsApp send returns appropriate error message when API key not configured
VERIFIED: Sale voucher CRUD with per-item GST calculations working correctly
VERIFIED: IGST calculation correct (full GST to IGST)
VERIFIED: No GST (gst_type=none) sets all GST amounts to 0
VERIFIED: Frontend WhatsApp Send button (green) visible on all sale voucher rows
VERIFIED: Frontend GST Summary button (amber Receipt) visible ONLY for vouchers with gst_type != 'none'
VERIFIED: GST Summary dialog shows HSN Code, GST%, Taxable Amt, CGST, SGST, Total Tax columns
VERIFIED: GST Summary dialog shows TOTAL row with correct totals
VERIFIED: GST Summary dialog shows Grand Total at bottom
VERIFIED: WhatsApp button is enabled (not disabled) when not in sending state
seed_data_creation: Test vouchers created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Sale Voucher Send and GST Summary Dialog features fully implemented and tested. Backend: POST /api/sale-book/{id}/whatsapp-send generates Tax Invoice PDF, uploads to tmpfiles.org, sends via 360Messenger WhatsApp API. Frontend: Green Send button on all voucher rows, Amber Receipt (GST Summary) button only for GST vouchers. GST Summary dialog shows HSN-wise tax breakup with CGST/SGST/IGST columns based on gst_type. WhatsApp API key may not be set in test env - endpoint returns success:false with appropriate error message.

whatsapp_send_existing_voucher.details: POST /api/sale-book/{id}/whatsapp-send returns 200 with success/error and pdf_url

whatsapp_send_pdf_upload.details: PDF generated and uploaded to tmpfiles.org, pdf_url returned in response

sale_voucher_no_gst.details: gst_type=none sets all GST amounts to 0

sale_voucher_crud.details: Create, Read, Update, Delete all working

frontend_whatsapp_button.details: Green Send button visible on all voucher rows

frontend_gst_summary_button.details: Amber Receipt button visible ONLY for vouchers with gst_type != 'none'

frontend_gst_summary_dialog.details: Dialog shows HSN Code, GST%, Taxable Amt, CGST, SGST, Total Tax columns with TOTAL row

frontend_whatsapp_button_state.details: WhatsApp button enabled when not in waSending state
